comment_content:
Slot is spineless our team is suffering in pressing especially from the front and yet he insists on playing Salah and Gakpo if you have a striker like Isak up front at least put players that can run and work around him did he even watch Isak at Newcastle why he thrived in that system was that he had wingers that pressed like mad dogs and a midfield that worked tirelessly for the team if he keeps playing Salah and Gakpo then our attack will keep suffering because both of them would opt to shoot first before they think about passing and Gakpo can’t create to save his life and he is as slow as a turtle. 
Secondly our defense is too highly always and that allows teams to play through us easily in the counter this has been an issue since the beginning of the season infact since last year against PSG they exposed us a lot and it was just overlooked because we win the league as a manager you are meant to find solutions and he has proven incapable of finding solutions for this issue and we keep getting exposed and turned over week after week, I was watching the Arsenal game against Tottenham and also most of their other games Arteta was laughed at for buying midfielders and defenders that fits his systems before even buying attackers while Liverpool were investing heavily in attack and neglected defense and defensive midfield but who is laughing now?? What was even our plan if Ryan gets injured for a full season?? Arsenal had the best window out of everyone in the prem they recognized their main issues and got players to solve those issues while Liverpool had a good windows they neglected parts of the squad that also had issues and we are suffering the effects now we can’t drop Konate when he plays bad and Ryan is being used like a bar of soap same as Mac Allister because we don’t have a lot of reliable defensive minded midfielders. 

Finally Slot has till January to sort things out or start packing his luggage to go back the Netherlands because it is getting ridiculous at this point and the owners have to make big decisions now before this gets any worse target our key areas we have problems and spend to bring in quality players that can fix them especially in defensive midfield and defense and a versatile creative winger that can also press when needed and is fast because both our first choice wingers are getting slow as he’ll only fast attackers we have are Rio, Isak and Heki even Fede is loosing a turn of pace so we need at least one or two versatile wingers that can both create and defend when needed and also hold the ball look at PSG with Kvara and Doue and even most of the younger wingers they have bought from other academies and Slot has to start using Academy players especially in big games in the 70th or 80th minute not just bring them to make us numbers. 
Time is running out and he has to act fast to solve this or else.

comment_content:
Slot used all his tactical surprises last season. He succeeded because the team was fully fit, his style was new, and most rivals were underperforming. But this season, every team has figured him out. No new ideas, no plan B, and the rivals are much stronger.

His confidence from winning the title is turning into complacency. If the club keeps giving him blind trust without accountability, we could miss European football — and even slip toward the relegation zone. Nothing would be surprising with the current form.

comment_content: Even in corporate companies they bring in someone with the same level of seniority to the outgoing person. Example if a finance director is leaving then they will replace that position with another proven finance director who has the experience to ensure business is not interrupted. I’m just baffled how a head coach could have been selected to replace a manager. It’s like appointing a kitchen helper to become the head chef, the reason people become manager is after learning about how to manage a team and then they prove themselves and then only get the job they deserve. Guess Liverpool management just wanted a person who will be able to take the blame and put on a poker face and not question the managements decisions. This was how we were playing under Brendan Rodgers and sitting almost in the same position in the table and about the same time when he was sacked and Klopp came in. But rest assured fellow Liverpool fans Slot will still be here even after we are relegated because he is untouchable for winning us the league last season. Some People will say we are over reacting but just look at our position we are in mid table and if we stay there during Christmas we can be even worse situation with all the fixtures and more injuries for sure and by the time you know it come 2026 we will be battling for relegation just like how Everton was last season and few seasons before that. It’s time to hit the panic button and as fans demand immediate response from the head coach and the players. If we get relegated only the fans will still be supporting this club even after relegation but the players and coaching staffs will leave to other clubs. So we have all the rights to demand for an immediate improvement.

comment_content:
What I've learned with LFC recent form is...
1. We don't use our opposition's strengths against them like low block defending,  long throw-ins & set pieces... Open play is just not enough  to win every single match &  high ball posession doesn't necessarily lead to clean sheets nor goals if there's no inate desire to keep fighting for a win.

2. Mo Salah doesn't recognize   his insane technical ability as of yet...Salah doesn't need to dribble pass 1,2,3 players to create some sort of a goal scoring chance like we're used to seeing rather with the type of ball posession we are capable of keeping we need to get Salah in position where he can thread those beautiful through balls past 3,4,5 player or his hard to defend crosses to the far post with his left foot on the right wing(this is where Florian can literally help him shine). He's still got it but, it's up to him to recognize that he can start looking up to find a better option in front of goal rather than taking a shot the moment he receives the ball. Haters gonna hate but Salah you're thee Egyptian King, & YNWA.❤🇮🇶👑

3. Virgil Van Dijk has been world class since he arrived at Anfield but his form lately has left us to face the hard truth  that going forward, he either needs an extra center back in the back line for support or rather a natural defensive midfielder (I miss you Bajcetic, stunt on these haters when you come back stronger). Konaté on the other hand has been quite exceptional honestly is just that with the absense of Trent  the responsibility of playing from the back has left him with mistakes that leave him highly criticized as a player forgetting what a Top class defender he is. Please by any means keep Konaté. Rather sell Gomez if the club signs Guehi.

4. Our team is full of ballers trust Slot we will eventually start clicking, we have like only Florian, Connor, Jeremy, Giovanni & Stefan unfortunately out on injury we have a high probability of signing a top class defender is Guehi. Its still scary. All these new signings are gonna ball.

5. Last but not least Slot is not the problem if anything he is the solution.
This is a man who won the Prem in his first season show respect where its worth. 
In Slot Football I trust

Losing is disappointing but we stay together even through the tough times YNWA.❤
